subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Divine Presence! This age and cycle cannot be compared to the former centuries, for the epochs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حضرت یزدان این کور و دور را بقرون اولی قیاس نتوان نمود چه که اعصار
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation
